name: chain_theres_one_ai_business_model_that_gets_
method: There’s one AI business model that gets stickier the more the technology improve

stages.task: Scrape job boards, LinkedIn, and Google Maps for businesses posting manual-process roles (data entry, report generation, email management). Extract company name, domain, tech stack signals, employee count.
Score leads by AI-integration readiness: manual processes visible on site, no existing AI tools, $1M+ revenue signals, 10-200 employees sweet spot. Filter to top 20% by score.

For each qualified lead, identify their specific manual bottleneck, estimate hours saved with AI automation, calculate ROI at $50-150/hr saved. Generate personalized cold email using 6-question framework from procedural memory.
Send cold emails via custom SMTP script, track opens/replies, auto-followup sequence (3 touches over 10 days), log all interactions.
